signals.reasoning: Hold and manage the live TON short for now. This is a fresh re-entry sitting near flat rather than a given-back winner, and the macro tape still leans risk-off, but the lack of a valid stop keeps conviction capped.
BTC is already in a liquidation-flush state, so I would not chase a fresh short after the initial dump.
ETH is also already flushing and does not offer a clean new edge in either direction right here.
SOL remains the cleanest reduced-size short lean because price is still down while open interest is rising, which suggests fresh shorts are still pressing.
MERL is already deep into a flush and too illiquid to trust for a fresh short chase.
ZEREBRO is already in a hard flush and too illiquid to trust for a serious fresh position.
DYM has already fallen hard and is too illiquid to trust for a fresh short entry after the move.
SAGA is already weak and too illiquid to trust for a serious fresh short chase.
WCT is already down hard and too low-liquidity to trust for a fresh directional trade.
BLUR has squeeze fuel from negative predicted funding, but liquidity is poor and the active veto blocks forcing a fresh long.
TNSR has squeeze characteristics too, but it is already in a flush and too illiquid to trust for a fresh long under veto.
FARTCOIN remains a modest short lean because it is still green on the day and still reads more like a short-covering rally than a clean washout.
PENGU is weak but not showing enough structure or crowding to justify a fresh directional call.
REZ has extreme squeeze fuel, but after a large flush and with poor liquidity I would not force a fresh long here.
XPL is slipping, but it is not clean enough to short fresh and the board already flags it as no-trade.
ARB is already in a flush state and does not offer a clean new edge after the first dump leg.
VIRTUAL has some squeeze fuel from negative funding, but after the broad dump I would rather wait for a cleaner reset before taking either side.
VVV is still holding up too well relative to the broader tape and still reads as a short-covering rally, which keeps it on the reduced-size fade side.
ENA remains a reduced-size short lean because the tape is weak and the coin is still slipping without any sign of real support.
MELANIA is already weak and too illiquid to trust for a serious fresh short entry after the move.
